parameters.query:
SELECT 
  order_number,
  customer_name,
  email,
  status,
  items,
  total,
  shipping_method,
  tracking_number,
  carrier,
  shipping_address,
  created_at
FROM orders 
WHERE order_number = '{{ $('Workflow Input').item.json.order_number }}'
LIMIT 1

SELECT 
  order_number,
  customer_name,
  email,
  status,
  items,
  total,
  shipping_method,
  tracking_number,
  carrier,
  shipping_address,
  created_at
FROM orders 
WHERE email = '{{ $('Workflow Input').item.json.email }}'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 5
